title: Ancient origin of the dorso-ventral patterning system of vertebrate paired fins
author: Dale, Rebecca E
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains multiomic (RNA seq + ATAC seq) data generated from the pectoral and dorsal fins of the Epaulette shark Hemiscyllium ocellatum. Fin tissues were collected from developmental stages 30/31 and nuclei isolated. Library preparation was done using 10X Genomics workflows.
steps_raw: This dataset contains multiomic (RNA seq + ATAC seq) data generated from the pectoral and dorsal fins of the Epaulette shark Hemiscyllium ocellatum. Fin tissues were collected from developmental stages 30/31 and nuclei isolated. Library preparation was done using 10X Genomics workflows.
